definition.label: Light background
definition.info: Used for background accents on the home page

definition.label: Background gradient
definition.info: Background gradient replaces background where possible.

settings.label: Enable image parallax
settings.info: Some large images will animate movement opposite to the scroll direction.

settings.label: Parallax strength
settings.info: Strong parallax will result in image zooming. Lower strength is recommended.

settings.label: Enable borders
settings.info: For Featured collection, Collection list and Blog posts.

settings.label: Enable superscript
settings.info: Show how many products are in a collection
Icon appears while site is loading

settings.label: Image 1
settings.info: 300 x 90px .jpg recommended.

settings.label: Image 2
settings.info: 300 x 90px .jpg recommended.

settings.label: Instagram
settings.info: https://instagram.com/shopify

settings.info: https://tiktok.com/@shopify

settings.info: http://shopify.tumblr.com

settings.label: Blog feed
settings.info: http://store.myshopify.com/blogs/news.atom

settings.content: For collections, search results, and sections with products in a grid.

settings.label: Text size
settings.info: Automatically generated by the base size.

settings.label: Overlay text
settings.info: Only works with tall images

settings.label: Product image aspect ratio
settings.info: Wide to tall
Add tag '_preorder' or '_badge_with_custom_text' to a product in order to show the badge

settings.label: Date limit
settings.info: Badge appears if product was created within this many days

settings.label: Alignment
settings.info: Not recommended to use bottom alignment when quick add is enabled

settings.label: Show recipient information form for gift card products
settings.info: Gift card products can optionally be sent direct to a recipient along with a personal message.

settings.label: Show siblings on collections
settings.info: Learn more about linked [color siblings](https://broadcast.invisiblethemes.com/siblings/product-siblings/about-product-siblings)

settings.label: Show cutline
settings.info: Learn more about [cutlines](https://broadcast.invisiblethemes.com/collections/collection-pages/cutline)
Show an image with your size or custom variant. Works best when form style is set to classic. [Learn more](https://invisiblethemes.com/link/broadcast/size-variant-image)

settings.label: Show "Notify me when available" popup
settings.info: [Learn more](https://invisiblethemes.com/link/broadcast/back-in-stock)

settings.content: Let customers know a product is final sale and ineligible for returns.
For specific products or variants use metafields. [Learn more](https://invisiblethemes.com/link/broadcast/final-sale)

settings.label: Content on hover
settings.default: Final sale products can't be returned or exchanged.

settings.content: To use swatches on variants other than color, visit your [language files](/admin/settings/languages)

settings.label: Show sale indicator
settings.info: Red dot appears under color swatches

settings.label: Swatch style
settings.info: [Learn more](https://invisiblethemes.com/link/broadcast/swatch-styles)

settings.label: HEX codes and files
settings.info: Each rule must be in its own line. HEX codes and [image files](/admin/content/files?selectedView=all&media_type=IMAGE) accepted. [Learn more](https://broadcast.invisiblethemes.com/products/swatches)

settings.label: Favicon image
settings.info: 192 x 192px .png recommended.

settings.label: Minimum spend for free shipping
settings.info: Use round numbers. Exclude currency, symbols, and letters. [More info](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/shipping/setting-up-and-managing-your-shipping/free-shipping-rates#free-shipping-over-a-certain-value)

settings.label: Show lock icon on checkout button
Enable terms and conditions requirement for checkout
settings.info: This will disable the "Buy it now" button

settings.label: Checkbox label
settings.default: I agree to the terms and conditions

settings.info: Display navigation buttons and products when cart is empty.

settings.label: Menu
settings.info: This menu won't show dropdown items.

settings.content: Note that cart and checkout totals will always show the currency code, and itemized, unit, and installment prices will not.

settings.label: Exclude collections
settings.info: Use comma to separate the collections

settings.label: Exclude collections if they contain
settings.info: Use comma to separate the collections
We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Select Position
settings.info: Choose where the wishlist button appears on your product page. Select 'Custom Placement' to manually specify a location using a CSS selector. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13249541-how-to-find-css-selectors-for-custom-button-placement)

settings.label: Custom Placement Selector
settings.info: Enter a CSS selector of the parent element to anchor the button. Only used if Button Position is set to 'Custom' Placement. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13249541-how-to-find-css-selectors-for-custom-button-placement)
We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Add to Wishlist HTML
settings.info: Customize the button's appearance for products not yet saved to the wishlist.

settings.label: Added to Wishlist HTML
settings.info: Customize the button's appearance for products already in the wishlist.

settings.label: Custom Styling (CSS)
settings.info: Modify CSS here to fine-tune the button's design and ensure it matches your theme perfectly.

settings.content: Configure the wishlist button that appears on collection pages. This button allows customers to add products to their wishlist directly from collection listings. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13712073-customizing-the-advanced-wishlist-button-on-collections-pages)
settings.info: We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Enable Quick Save Button
settings.info: Enable Quick Save Button on Collections Pages

settings.label: Show Social Count
settings.info: Display the number of times a product has been wishlisted

settings.label: Button HTML (Before Adding)
settings.info: Custom HTML for the wishlist button before a product is added. Leave empty to use default

settings.label: Button HTML (After Adding)
settings.info: Custom HTML for the wishlist button after a product is added. Leave empty to use default

settings.label: Button CSS
settings.info: CSS styles for the wishlist button. Leave empty to use default styles.

settings.label: Product URL Selector
settings.info: CSS selector to find product links on collection pages. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13712096-finding-selectors-for-advanced-collections-quick-save)

settings.label: Button Container Selector
settings.info: CSS selector for where to attach the wishlist button. [Help](https://help.getswym.com/en/articles/13712096-finding-selectors-for-advanced-collections-quick-save)

settings.content: Configure the wishlist launcher icon that appears in your store header. This icon provides quick access to the wishlist page and can display the count of saved products.
settings.info: We recommend using the Admin App to configure these settings. [Open App](/admin/apps/swym-relay)

settings.label: Enable Header Icon
settings.info: Enable or disable the wishlist launcher icon in your store header

settings.label: Show Wishlist Count
settings.info: Display the total number of products wishlisted by the customer

settings.label: Icon HTML
settings.info: Custom HTML for the wishlist icon. Leave empty to use default

settings.label: Count Bubble HTML
settings.info: Custom HTML for the count bubble that displays the number of wishlisted items

settings.label: Custom CSS
settings.info: CSS styles for the header icon. Leave empty to use default styles.

settings.label: Desktop Placement Selector
settings.info: CSS selector for where to attach the icon on desktop view

settings.label: Mobile Placement Selector
settings.info: CSS selector for where to attach the icon on mobile view
